# Data

This directory stores the application's runtime data.

## Purpose

The `data/` folder contains processed and generated data created during the execution of the AI Agent.

## Contents

Examples include:

* Processed security logs
* Normalized incident data
* AI analysis results
* Generated reports
* Temporary application data

## Notes

* Files in this directory are generated by the application.
* Do not store sensitive production data.
* Runtime files may be deleted or regenerated as needed.
